title: parathelypteris noveboracensis subsp. nevadensis
intro: Parathelypteris noveboracensis subsp. nevadensis is a subspecies of the fern genus Parathelypteris, commonly known as the New York fern. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Parathelypteris noveboracensis subsp. nevadensis include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve digestion. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are said to be effective in harnessing its medicinal properties.
